question: How many days had passed since I bought my Adidas running shoes when I realized one of the shoelaces on my old Converse sneakers had broken?
gold_answer: 14 days. 15 days (including the last day) is also acceptable.
reasoning_summary: User bought Adidas running shoes on January 10, 2023 (source 186). User realized one shoelace on old Converse sneakers broke on January 24, 2023 (source 83). The number of days between these two dates is 15 days.

required_slots.name: purchase date of Adidas running shoes

slots.name: purchase date of Adidas running shoes
realization date of broken shoelace
slots.query: realized shoelace broke Converse sneakers date

retrieval_queries: realized shoelace broke Converse sneakers date
plan.reason: Need both dates to compute days between purchase and realization.

p5.reason: Unfilled required slot 'realization date of broken shoelace' leads to abstention, but evidence provides the date.

p7.reason: Correctly uses purchase date Jan 10 and realization date Jan 24, computes 14 days difference.

verification.reason: p7 correctly calculates 14 days from Jan 10 to Jan 24; specialist miscalculates as 24 days.
